compliance_note: ships only after the offer document is live on Birchal; requires RG 234 balance-test re-review against the live disclosure document; the waitlist-scoped validator will flag transaction verbs ('invest') by design and that is EXPECTED for this draft. Do not ship until the offer document is public and copy is matched line-by-line to it. Any minimum is the {{OFFER_MIN_TBC}} placeholder until the offer document is public (facts.json OFFER-CONTEXT).
hook_type: Caples Why + named investor + numbers, into verbatim Pym quote (RG 234 balanced)
tactic: Why-named-investor hook -> verbatim Pym endorsement -> offer-is-live anchor -> risk/benefit balance -> read-and-decide
motivation: Authority + peer validation + offer-is-real, balanced with risk-reversal
primary_text:
Why Dom Pym rates us after 324 raises and $234M+.

"I've looked at Birchal from the founder's seat and the investor's seat, and from both angles the answer is the same. Birchal is one of the most important companies in Australian fintech."

Dom Pym, Triple Bubble.

Our own offer is now live on Birchal. Every investment carries risk and the value can fall as well as rise. The offer document sets out the risks, the terms and the minimum.

Read the offer document and decide for yourself.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: Why Dom Pym rates Birchal from both seats
description: The offer is live on Birchal. Read the offer document and decide for yourself.
_source_label: DRC V5 -- L4 Investor-validation (Offer-Live, existing investors, phase-gated)
_iterates: BIRCHAL-V5-W4 / V4-B2 investor-validation DNA, re-framed for the RG 234 offer-live regime. Inherits the V4 endorsement-only correction.
_v5_rationale: Inherits the V4-B2 VERIFY-PASS lesson exactly: 'rates us' is Pym's verbatim endorsement (QUOTE-001), NOT a claim he invested in / backed Birchal-the-company or this raise. No 'backed/followed/invested'. No multi-fund 'followed' claim.

RG 234 balance: the peer-endorsement benefit is paired with the equal-prominence risk sentence and the risk-reversal CTA. No return/guarantee language. Anchored to 'Our own offer is now live on Birchal'.
Pym quote (QUOTE-001) byte-exact, attribution 'Dom Pym, Triple Bubble' unchanged. Two in-body 'Birchal' inside the attributed verbatim (exempt); one 'Birchal' offer-anchor + one in the headline.
Waitlist-scoped validator WILL flag 'invest'/'investment' BY DESIGN. Expected, phase-gated. Hook Halbert 5/5 in --primary-text mode.
_drc_playbook: 11 Lifecycle Email Promo / Launch (offer-live variant, RG 234 balanced)
_drc_audience: B2C considered, most-aware. Existing Birchal investors, offer-live phase; peer signal weighs more than platform stats.
_offer_min_placeholder: {{OFFER_MIN_TBC}} -- not rendered in copy; minimum referenced only via the offer document. Do NOT hardcode $0.50/$250/etc (OFFER-CONTEXT, not public).
_compliance_findings_resolved: RG 234 balance test: benefit and risk equal prominence; 'Every investment carries risk and the value can fall as well as rise'; risk-reversal CTA. No return/guarantee/'guaranteed' language.
EXPECTED PHASE-GATED FLAG: waitlist-scoped validator will hard-block 'invest'/'investment' BY DESIGN. Expected for an offer-live draft; re-clear under RG 234 against the live disclosure document.
No hardcoded minimum / share price / parcel value; {{OFFER_MIN_TBC}} placeholder flagged, not rendered.
QUOTE-001: Dom Pym pasted verbatim, em-dash-free as stored, attributed 'Dom Pym, Triple Bubble'.

INVESTOR-ASSOCIATION (RG 234 / ACL s 18): no claim Pym invested in / backed Birchal-the-company or this raise. 'rates us' = his verbatim endorsement (QUOTE-001). No multi-fund 'followed/backed' claim present.
VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: no 'we will send you the offer'; offer is live on Birchal.
VERBATIM-CSF-WARNING: byte-exact final line, appears exactly once.

Subject discipline: 'Birchal' outside the quote appears twice (offer-anchor + headline); the two in-body 'Birchal' mentions are inside the attributed verbatim Pym quote and exempt from the brand-count rule.
Number traceability: 324=PLAT-001, $234M+=PLAT-002. No market-share / #1 / first claim.
